title: Plastobrassica pachypoda
uses:
Plastobrassica pachypoda is not a real plant species, and I couldn't find any information on it. However, I found information about another plant species called Pachypodium pachypodium is not typically associated with the name plastobrassica. But, I did find some information about Pachypodium pachypodium (or Pachypodium veitchii) which is a succulent plant. 
 Pachypodium pachypodium has some potential medicinal uses, as it contains compounds that have been reported to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties.
